reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures the primary guest-state navigation controls required for the Home workflow, but includes noisy and duplicate elements, weak naming, and lacks explicit negative-state validation elements needed for robust guest-state automation.

issues.message: The generic anchor element duplicates the Home button functionality already represented by the Home button control.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the generic xpath=//a element and retain only the semantic Home button element with locator id=auto_home_btn.

issues.message: The locator xpath=//a is overly generic and likely to match multiple links across the application, making it brittle and unsafe for downstream automation.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove this element or replace it with a uniquely identifiable semantic locator tied to a business control.

issues.message: The background content container is decorative/layout-only and does not provide meaningful automation value for workflow interaction or validation.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the background_content element from the approved page model.

issues.message: The element name is too generic and loses the business meaning defined in the workflow context.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to person_profile_button to align with approved workflow terminology and downstream resource naming.

issues.message: The element name is compressed and less readable than the approved business terminology.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to customer_signup_button for readability and consistency.

issues.message: The element name is compressed and less readable than the approved business terminology.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to clean_survey_button for readability and consistency.

issues.message: The element name is compressed and less readable than the approved business terminology.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to site_survey_button for readability and consistency.

issues.message: The workflow explicitly requires validation that authenticated-only controls and the logged-in user name button are absent or non-actionable in guest state, but no corresponding validation elements are present in the artifact.
issues.suggested_fix: Add identifiable elements or reusable validation targets for authenticated-only controls and the logged-in user name indicator if they exist in the UI.

issues.message: No explicit guest-state page indicator element is modeled, even though the workflow repeatedly validates the Home page guest state.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a stable guest-state indicator element if available, such as a guest banner, guest header state, or authenticated-user absence indicator.

approved_elements.name: person_profile_button
approved_elements.description: Opens the Login page or Login view from the Home guest state.

approved_elements.description: Shared Home shell navigation back control.

approved_elements.description: Shared Home shell control used to navigate or remain on the Home page.

approved_elements.description: Navigates guest users to the customer-search page.
